outlook.summary: Extreme bearish positioning with PCR 3.99 monthly and smirk skew (1.69). Strong PUT walls at 630/640/645 create layered support structure. Spot near gamma flip (652.79) and max pain (655) suggests short-term consolidation with bullish magnet effect toward 655.

levels.motivazione: Critical gamma equilibrium point just below spot (654.54). Price direction from here determines dealer hedging behavior. Positive 0DTE GEX suggests stability if held above.
Weekly max pain acting as price attractor. High 0DTE call volume (70,202) confirms active interest. Only 0.07% from spot - immediate target.
Initial support with 9,095 PUT OI and massive 58,172 volume. First line of defense below gamma flip. Break targets 645.
Highest 0DTE PUT OI (19,834) coincides with 0DTE max pain and strong MONTHLY presence (36K). Confluence creates robust support structure.
RESONANCE across ALL expiries: 0DTE (14K), WEEKLY (19K), MONTHLY (106K PUT OI). Structural support with massive open interest alignment.
Strongest RESONANCE level. WEEKLY (127K) and MONTHLY (121K) PUT OI create ultimate floor. Extreme bearish positioning suggests potential contrarian bounce zone.
Highest 0DTE CALL OI (14,389) with 40K volume. Primary resistance above spot. High volume suggests active testing of this level.
Dominant MONTHLY CALL OI (33,085). Major structural resistance for upside moves. Monthly max pain (665) sits below this level.
